name: antigravity-mcp-sidecar
description: All-in-one companion: auto-accept agent prompts + MCP registry routing for Antigravity.

antigravityMcpSidecar.enabled.description: Enable or disable the auto-accept feature.

antigravityMcpSidecar.nativePollInterval.description: Polling interval (ms) for native VS Code commands (Accept, Run).

antigravityMcpSidecar.cdpPollInterval.description: Polling interval (ms) for CDP webview button clicks (Always Allow).

antigravityMcpSidecar.cdpFixedHost.description: Optional fixed CDP host override. When set, this host is probed first.

antigravityMcpSidecar.cdpFixedPort.description: Optional fixed CDP port override (0 means auto). When set (>0), only this port is probed.

antigravityMcpSidecar.cdpPortCandidates.description: Comma-separated ports/ranges used for CDP probing, e.g. 9000,9222,7800-7810.

antigravityMcpSidecar.antigravityExecuta.description: Optional absolute path to Antigravity executable. Leave empty to auto-detect.

antigravityMcpSidecar.antigravityLaunchP.description: Default launch port when cdpFixedPort is 0.

antigravityMcpSidecar.antigravityLaunchE.description: Optional extra launch arguments appended when launching Antigravity.

antigravityMcpSidecar.bridgeSharedToken.description: Optional shared token for sidecar control-plane HMAC auth. Leave empty to auto-manage in ~/.config/antigravity-mcp/bridge.token.

antigravityMcpSidecar.bridgeMaxSkewMs.description: Maximum timestamp skew allowed when verifying signed sidecar control requests.

antigravityMcpSidecar.bridgeRequestTtlMs.description: Maximum age for pending sidecar control requests before auto-reject.

antigravityMcpSidecar.quotaWarnThreshold.description: Show warning style/alert when tracked quota falls below this percent.

antigravityMcpSidecar.quotaCriticalThres.description: Show critical style/alert when tracked quota falls below this percent.

antigravityMcpSidecar.quotaAlertCooldown.description: Minimum minutes between repeated low-quota alerts at the same level.

antigravityMcpSidecar.quotaStaleMinutes.description: Mark quota snapshot as stale if older than this many minutes.

scripts.verify: bash -c 'VSIX=$(ls -t *.vsix 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$VSIX" ]; then echo "❌ No .vsix file found"; exit 1; fi; VSIX_PATH=$(pwd)/$VSIX; cd /tmp && rm -rf vsix_verify && mkdir vsix_verify && cd vsix_verify && unzip -q "$VSIX_PATH" && if [ -d extension/node_modules/ws ]; then echo "✅ $VSIX: ws module present"; else echo "❌ $VSIX: ws module MISSING"; exit 1; fi'
